Chinese labs are tied to Mexican cartels through crypto transactions; $5.5 million seized.
news.summary: Chinese laboratories have been connected to Mexican drug distributors through on-chain evidence. Authorities have seized approximately $5.5 million in cryptocurrency in relation to this investigation.

Lianlian DigiTech sees a 64.7% rise in digital payment TPV for 2024, with adjusted operating profit surging.
news.summary: On March 18, 2025, Lianlian DigiTech, a prominent digital payment and fintech firm based in Hangzhou, China, disclosed its financial performance for 2024. The company's total payment volume (TPV) for digital payments reached a noteworthy figure as of December 31, 2024.

news.headline: VOOPOO introduces ARGUS G3 pod, features iCOSM CODE 2.0. Aimed to offer smoother vaping experience.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, VOOPOO unveiled the ARGUS G3 pod, a highly anticipated device that promises a top-notch vaping experience. Powered by the innovative iCOSM CODE 2.0 technology, the device aims to set new standards in the vaping industry. The unveiling was a significant milestone for VOOPOO's engineers, who described the event as the realization of a dream. The ARGUS G3 is positioned as a strong contender for the title of the best pod of 2025, showcasing a seamless, flavorful, and bright vaping experience.

news.summary: In recent updates, it has been reported that a total of 500 new cases of the virus have been confirmed in the past 24 hours, bringing the overall number of cases to 10,000 in the country. Furthermore, the number of deaths related to the virus has increased by 20, reaching a total of 250 fatalities. Authorities have emphasized the importance of following safety guidelines and practicing social distancing to curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, healthcare facilities are being ramped up to accommodate the rising number of cases. The situation remains critical and individuals are urged to stay informed and take necessary precautions.

news.headline: Dessert Holdings recalls Favorite Day™ Gourmet New York Style Cheesecake 6oz/2ct (Lot code 25028A1 000039133) due to undeclared pecans.
news.summary: In Kennesaw, Georgia, on March 19, 2025, Dessert Holdings LLC issued a recall for Target brand Favorite Day™ Gourmet New York Style Cheesecake 6oz/2ct. The affected lot code is 25028A1 000039133 with UPC 0 85239 09690 1. This recall was initiated due to product mislabeling leading to undeclared pecans in the cheesecake. Consumers with pecan allergies are at risk and advised not to consume the product.

news.headline: Pearl partners with Medit for AI-powered dental diagnostics, enhancing Medit Link platform; improves clinical outcomes.
news.summary: Medit Link and Pearl's AI-powered diagnostic solutions will be combined, providing dental clinicians with improved diagnostic support and communication tools. This integration aims to enhance clinical outcomes and patient experiences. The collaboration was announced on March 19, 2025, between companies based in Seoul, South Korea, and Los Angeles. This partnership will leverage advanced technology to benefit dental practitioners and their patients.

news.headline: Medit partners with Imagoworks to streamline the edentulous prosthetic workflow; Medit SmartX with Imagoworks' AOX to enhance restoration services.
news.summary: On March 19, 2025, in Seoul, South Korea, an integration between Medit SmartX and Imagoworks' AOX was announced. This integration aims to enhance the edentulous prosthetic workflow for dental professionals. By combining these technologies, seamless data transfer and precise prosthetic design are ensured. This synergy will result in improved restoration services, ultimately leading to better patient care. It offers a more efficient process for dental professionals to work with, ultimately improving their services and patient outcomes.

news.headline: Netflix to stream anime "The Summer Hikaru Died" globally. New key visual & character visuals revealed by CyberAgent, Inc.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Tokyo, CyberAgent, Inc. revealed a fresh key visual and character visuals for the TV anime adaptation of the renowned author Mokumokuren's "The Summer Hikaru Died." The show is based on the award-winning novel published by KADOKAWA and produced by CygamesPictures. This announcement marks a significant step in the promotion of the series, featuring captivating artwork to entice viewers.

Solana CEO apologizes for controversial ad blending patriotism and tech, deleted after 1.2M views and 1.3K comments. Open-source focus promised.
news.summary: Solana Labs CEO Anatoly Yakovenko has expressed regret over a controversial ad mixing American patriotism and tech innovation with gender identity messaging, admitting it was mean-spirited towards a marginalized group. The ad, posted on Solana’s X account, garnered 1.2 million views and 1,300 comments before being deleted after nine hours. Solana has not officially commented on the issue, but Yakovenko apologized and pledged to refocus Solana on software development and decentralization, steering clear of cultural controversies. The ad, showcasing America discussing innovation in a therapy session, touched on creating new genders and pronouns, drawing criticism for belittling marginalized groups. The Solana Foundation has not responded to inquiries regarding the ad. The controversial ad was posted despite an earlier claim that Solana is for everyone. Transgender individuals reportedly make a significant contribution to open-source software and cryptography, with a small percentage found in the general population, per a 2017 GitHub survey and other data. The ad's removal came after backlash and deletion of supportive tweets from key Solana ecosystem figures. Solana’s X account has 3.3 million followers and reshared Yakovenko’s apology post.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures rise following Powell's remarks; Tesla, Nvidia, Boeing stocks surge. Fed chief reassured investors.
news.summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Powell addressed investors, resulting in positive reactions from the stock market. Despite this, the Dow Jones Futures saw an increase, with notable rises in the stock prices of Tesla, Nvidia, and Boeing. Investors are urged to watch for a specific signal following Powell's address.

World leaders mark first World Parasite Awareness Day to raise awareness about increasing health threats posed by parasites.
news.summary: March 19, 2025 - Health officials worldwide are observing the inaugural World Parasite Awareness Day to educate the public about the rising prevalence of parasites. This initiative aims to highlight the importance of parasite prevention in safeguarding the health of both animals and humans. The event signifies a crucial step in combating this issue on a global scale.

news.headline: Robinhood gets 'Buy' rating with 50% upside from Compass Point due to potential growth in crypto business amid  regulatory tailwinds.
news.summary: Compass Point predicts a rise in Robinhood's cryptocurrency business due to favorable regulatory conditions and opportunities for cross-selling.

Chinese stocks outperform S&P 500, with the iShares China ETF up 26.6% YTD while SPY down 3.2%, marking the largest gap since 2007.
news.summary: Chinese stocks are poised for their strongest quarterly performance compared to the S&P 500 in almost 15 years, as investors shift away from overpriced U.S. stocks to undervalued Chinese equities in anticipation of a growth driven by policies. The iShares China Large-Cap ETF (NYSE:FXI) has risen by 26.6% year-to-date by March 17, the best quarterly leap since early 2009. In contrast, the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE:SPY) has declined by 3.2% year-to-date, widening the outperformance of Chinese stocks to nearly 30%, the largest gap since mid-2007. Value Partners Group is optimistic about the Chinese stock market, indicating that the China A-share market is approaching its lowest point with low valuations and market expectations, thereby limiting the downside risk. The firm foresees a positive market trend.

news.headline: Bank of Korea: Comments in Statement After Fed Meeting
Pieridae Energy reports 2024 financials: generated $64.6M in NOI, produced 27,763 boe/d, $1.25B in reserves. Set 2025 goals.
news.summary: Pieridae Energy Limited reported its financial and operating results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company generated Net Operating Income of $64.6 million and produced 27,763 barrels of oil equivalent per day (84% natural gas) during the year. In the fourth quarter, they posted NOI of $13.7 million and production of 22,568 boe/d. The company's Proved Developed Producing PV10 value stands at $621.4 million, and Total Proved plus Probable PV10 value is $1,252.2 million. Pieridae highlighted its key achievements in 2024, including divesting legacy LNG assets, repaying high-cost loans, and raising over $33 million in equity for production and optimization projects. The company incurred net losses of $38.9 million, with various financial metrics and highlighted achievements throughout the year. Pieridae's reserves evaluation showed a slight decrease in reserves compared to the previous year. The company remains optimistic for 2025, focusing on cost reduction, debt paydown, and exploring new opportunities.

news.headline: Bank of Korea to monitor financial market closely
Adyen partners with Affirm to bring pay-over-time options to UK merchants for increased consumer flexibility.
news.summary: Adyen, a prominent financial technology platform, has broadened its collaboration with Affirm Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AFRM), the well-known payment network, to include the U.K market. This partnership allows Adyen’s U.K. merchants to integrate Affirm at checkout, providing customers with the option to access flexible pay-over-time plans. The expansion aims to enable merchants to drive growth by offering a wider range of payment options to consumers in the U.K.
